_note: Layer 2 calculation from this article, for the central process to merge into data/stat_bank.json. Not edited directly here.
stat: Sterling value of a Made Smarter-backed UK manufacturer's reported AI invoice-processing time saving, at ONS median admin/secretarial pay
method: Recipe A (sterling conversion) — converting a reported hours-saved case study into a loaded sterling value using ONS pay data

sources_used.title: First wave of South East manufacturers geared for growth with Made Smarter
Rates and thresholds for employers 2026 to 2027

workings: Made Smarter case study: Nordell's AI-powered invoice processing is expected to save more than 60 hours of administration every month, i.e. 720 hours/year. ONS ASHE 2025: full-time median hourly pay for administrative and secretarial occupations = GBP 14.80. Grossed to an annual full-time-equivalent salary at 37.5 hours/week x 52 weeks: 14.80 x 37.5 x 52 = GBP 28,860. Employer NI 2026/27 (15% above the GBP 5,000 secondary threshold): (28,860 - 5,000) x 0.15 = GBP 3,579. Employer minimum auto-enrolment pension (3% on qualifying earnings above GBP 6,240): (28,860 - 6,240) x 0.03 = GBP 678.60. Fully loaded annual cost: 28,860 + 3,579 + 678.60 = GBP 33,117.60. Loaded hourly rate at 1,950 hours/year (37.5 x 52): 33,117.60 / 1,950 = GBP 16.98/hour. Value of 720 hours/year saved: 720 x 16.98 = GBP 12,225.60, rounded to approximately GBP 12,200/year. This values only the reclaimed staff time; it excludes the AI software's own subscription cost and any Made Smarter grant contribution, so it is a gross saving figure, not a net ROI.
